creator: ohartman@mail.zedat.fu-berlin.de
text:
When using network cleints connecting to a refdb-server, like refdbib, hitting Ctrl-D while asking for password ends up in an indefinitely loop printing endless 'Please enter your passowrd' on terminal and slowing down the box.

How-To-Repeat: Try connecting to a refdb server via refdbib or any network-capable cleint. When being asked for entering the password, hit Ctrl-D and watch.
